```{r}

library(phangorn)
library(ape)
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)

# ----------------- USER -----------------
OUT_DIR <- "/home/nacho/HDD16/Nacho/RepliCOOC/rep_distances/letsshowmultirepps/control_mantel/control_fastas"

MODEL <- "GTR"
OPT_GAMMA <- TRUE
OPT_INV <- FALSE

DO_BOOTSTRAP <- TRUE
BS_REPS <- 100

MANTEL_PERM <- 9999
MIRROR_PERM <- 2000
# ----------------------------------------

dirs <- list.dirs(OUT_DIR, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)

results <- data.frame(
  pair = character(),
  repA = character(),
  repB = character(),
  n_taxa = integer(),
  mantel_r = numeric(),
  mantel_p = numeric(),
  mirror_r = numeric(),
  mirror_p_emp = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

failures <- data.frame(
  pair = character(),
  error = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (d in dirs) {
  aligned <- list.files(d, pattern = "_all_aligned\\.f(ast)?a$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(aligned) < 2) next
  aligned <- sort(aligned)

  alnA <- aligned[1]
  alnB <- aligned[2]
  pair_label <- basename(d)
  OUT_PREFIX <- file.path(d, pair_label)

  repA_name <- sub("_all_aligned\\.f(ast)?a$", "", basename(alnA))
  repB_name <- sub("_all_aligned\\.f(ast)?a$", "", basename(alnB))

  cat("=== Processing pair:", pair_label, "\n")
  cat("  alnA:", alnA, "\n  alnB:", alnB, "\n")

  aln1 <- tryCatch(
    read.phyDat(alnA, format = "fasta", type = "DNA"),
    error = function(e) {
      cat("Error reading", alnA, ":", e$message, "\n")
      NULL
    }
  )

  aln2 <- tryCatch(
    read.phyDat(alnB, format = "fasta", type = "DNA"),
    error = function(e) {
      cat("Error reading", alnB, ":", e$message, "\n")
      NULL
    }
  )

  if (is.null(aln1) || is.null(aln2)) {
    failures <- rbind(failures, data.frame(pair = pair_label, error = "read_error"))
    next
  }

  # Keep ASSEMBLY_ACC (text before first '|')
  rename_acc <- function(namesv) {
    sapply(namesv, function(n) if (grepl("\\|", n)) sub("\\|.*$", "", n) else n, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  }

  acc1 <- rename_acc(names(aln1))
  acc2 <- rename_acc(names(aln2))

  if (any(duplicated(acc1))) {
    cat("  Warning: duplicated accessions in aln1; keeping first occurrence.\n")
    keep_idx <- !duplicated(acc1)
    aln1 <- aln1[keep_idx]
    acc1 <- acc1[keep_idx]
  }

  if (any(duplicated(acc2))) {
    cat("  Warning: duplicated accessions in aln2; keeping first occurrence.\n")
    keep_idx <- !duplicated(acc2)
    aln2 <- aln2[keep_idx]
    acc2 <- acc2[keep_idx]
  }

  names(aln1) <- acc1
  names(aln2) <- acc2

  cat("  n tips normalized aln1:", length(aln1), " aln2:", length(aln2), "\n")

  d1_start <- dist.ml(aln1)
  nj1 <- NJ(d1_start)

  d2_start <- dist.ml(aln2)
  nj2 <- NJ(d2_start)

  cat("  Building pml objects and running optim.pml...\n")
  pml1 <- pml(nj1, data = aln1)
  pml2 <- pml(nj2, data = aln2)

  control <- pml.control(trace = 1)

  fit1 <- tryCatch(
    optim.pml(pml1, model = MODEL, optGamma = OPT_GAMMA, optInv = OPT_INV, control = control),
    error = function(e) {
      cat("  optim.pml failed for aln1:", e$message, "\n")
      NULL
    }
  )

  fit2 <- tryCatch(
    optim.pml(pml2, model = MODEL, optGamma = OPT_GAMMA, optInv = OPT_INV, control = control),
    error = function(e) {
      cat("  optim.pml failed for aln2:", e$message, "\n")
      NULL
    }
  )

  if (is.null(fit1) || is.null(fit2)) {
    failures <- rbind(failures, data.frame(pair = pair_label, error = "optim_pml_failed"))
    next
  }

  tree1 <- fit1$tree
  tree2 <- fit2$tree

  write.tree(tree1, file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_", repA_name, "_ML.tree"))
  write.tree(tree2, file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_", repB_name, "_ML.tree"))

  if (DO_BOOTSTRAP) {
    cat("  Running bootstrap...\n")

    bs1 <- tryCatch(
      bootstrap.pml(fit1, bs = BS_REPS, optNni = TRUE, control = pml.control(trace = 0)),
      error = function(e) {
        cat("  bootstrap failed for aln1:", e$message, "\n")
        NULL
      }
    )

    if (!is.null(bs1)) {
      tree1_bs <- plotBS(tree1, bs1, type = "none")
      write.tree(tree1_bs, file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_", repA_name, "_ML_bootstrapped.tree"))
    }

    bs2 <- tryCatch(
      bootstrap.pml(fit2, bs = BS_REPS, optNni = TRUE, control = pml.control(trace = 0)),
      error = function(e) {
        cat("  bootstrap failed for aln2:", e$message, "\n")
        NULL
      }
    )

    if (!is.null(bs2)) {
      tree2_bs <- plotBS(tree2, bs2, type = "none")
      write.tree(tree2_bs, file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_", repB_name, "_ML_bootstrapped.tree"))
    }
  }

  cat("  Computing patristic distance matrices...\n")
  D1 <- as.matrix(cophenetic.phylo(tree1)); diag(D1) <- 0
  D2 <- as.matrix(cophenetic.phylo(tree2)); diag(D2) <- 0

  write.table(D1, file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_", repA_name, "_patristic.tsv"), sep = "\t", quote = FALSE)
  write.table(D2, file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_", repB_name, "_patristic.tsv"), sep = "\t", quote = FALSE)

  common <- intersect(rownames(D1), rownames(D2))
  cat("  Common accessions:", length(common), "\n")

  if (length(common) < 4) {
    cat("  <4 common taxa -> skipping Mantel\n")
    failures <- rbind(failures, data.frame(pair = pair_label, error = "too_few_common_taxa"))
    next
  }

  D1c <- D1[common, common]
  D2c <- D2[common, common]

  cat("  Running Mantel with", MANTEL_PERM, "permutations...\n")
  set.seed(42)
  mant <- mantel(as.dist(D1c), as.dist(D2c), method = "pearson", permutations = MANTEL_PERM)

  saveRDS(mant, file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_mantel.rds"))
  write.table(
    as.data.frame(t(as.numeric(mant[c("statistic", "signif")]))),
    file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_mantel_summary.txt"),
    sep = "\t",
    quote = FALSE,
    col.names = c("Mantel_r", "p_value"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  v1 <- as.vector(as.dist(D1c))
  v2 <- as.vector(as.dist(D2c))
  dfm <- data.frame(d1 = v1, d2 = v2)

  cor_test <- cor.test(dfm$d1, dfm$d2, method = "pearson")
  write.table(
    data.frame(stat = cor_test$statistic, p.value = cor_test$p.value),
    file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_mirror_cor_test.txt"),
    sep = "\t",
    quote = FALSE
  )

  png(paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_mirror_scatter.png"), width = 1200, height = 1000, res = 150)
  plot(
    dfm$d1, dfm$d2,
    xlab = paste0("Patristic distances (", repA_name, ")"),
    ylab = paste0("Patristic distances (", repB_name, ")"),
    main = paste0(pair_label, " mirror r = ", round(cor(dfm$d1, dfm$d2), 3))
  )
  abline(lm(dfm$d2 ~ dfm$d1), col = "blue")
  dev.off()

  cat("  Running empirical permutation for mirror-tree...\n")
  set.seed(42)
  orig_cor <- cor(dfm$d1, dfm$d2)
  perm_cor <- numeric(MIRROR_PERM)
  labels <- rownames(D1c)

  for (i in seq_len(MIRROR_PERM)) {
    perm <- sample(labels)
    D2perm <- D2c[perm, perm]
    perm_cor[i] <- cor(as.vector(as.dist(D1c)), as.vector(as.dist(D2perm)))
  }

  p_emp <- (sum(abs(perm_cor) >= abs(orig_cor)) + 1) / (MIRROR_PERM + 1)

  write.table(
    data.frame(emp_p = p_emp, orig_cor = orig_cor),
    file = paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_mirror_perm_result.txt"),
    sep = "\t",
    quote = FALSE
  )

  png(paste0(OUT_PREFIX, "_perm_hist.png"), width = 1200, height = 800, res = 150)
  hist(perm_cor, breaks = 60,
       main = paste0("Permutation null (n=", MIRROR_PERM, ") - observed r=", round(orig_cor, 3)))
  abline(v = orig_cor, col = "red", lwd = 2)
  dev.off()

  results <- rbind(
    results,
    data.frame(
      pair = pair_label,
      repA = basename(alnA),
      repB = basename(alnB),
      n_taxa = length(common),
      mantel_r = mant$statistic,
      mantel_p = mant$signif,
      mirror_r = orig_cor,
      mirror_p_emp = p_emp,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )

  cat("=== Done pair:", pair_label, "\n\n")
}

out_table <- file.path(OUT_DIR, "pairwise_mantel_results_control.tsv")
write.table(results, file = out_table, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

if (nrow(failures) > 0) {
  write.table(
    failures,
    file = file.path(OUT_DIR, "pairwise_mantel_results_control_failures.tsv"),
    sep = "\t",
    quote = FALSE,
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}

cat("Wrote combined results to", out_table, "\n")
```
